sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5133" key="a)melh/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμελ-ής</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μέλος</etym>) <sense id="n5133.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unmelodious,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φωνή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.117</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
